queries.question: What are the opening hours of arrival halls with 500-people capacity and opening hours of baggage reclaim facilities with same capacity?
queries.sql:
SELECT TerminalFacility.OpeningHours 
FROM TerminalFacility
WHERE (TerminalFacility.Arrival_Facilities = "Arrival Hall" OR TerminalFacility.Arrival_Facilities = "Baggage Reclaim") AND TerminalFacility.Maximum_Capacity = "500 passengers"
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/airport#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/airport/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?openinghours WHERE {
  ?terminalfacility a :TerminalFacility .
  ?terminalfacility p:OpeningHours ?openinghours .
  ?terminalfacility p:Arrival_Facilities ?arrival_facilities_w .
  ?terminalfacility p:Arrival_Facilities ?arrival_facilities_w2 .
  ?terminalfacility p:Maximum_Capacity ?maximum_capacity_w .
  FILTER((((STR(?arrival_facilities_w) = "Arrival Hall" || STR(?arrival_facilities_w2) = "Baggage Reclaim")) && STR(?maximum_capacity_w) = "500 passengers"))
}

queries.question: List opening hours of all arrival hall facilities and also list opening hours of baggage reclaim facilities with capacity of 500 people.
queries.sql:
SELECT TerminalFacility.OpeningHours 
FROM TerminalFacility
WHERE TerminalFacility.Arrival_Facilities = "Arrival Hall" OR TerminalFacility.Arrival_Facilities = "Baggage Reclaim" AND TerminalFacility.Maximum_Capacity = "500 passengers"
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/airport#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/airport/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?openinghours WHERE {
  ?terminalfacility a :TerminalFacility .
  ?terminalfacility p:OpeningHours ?openinghours .
  ?terminalfacility p:Arrival_Facilities ?arrival_facilities_w .
  ?terminalfacility p:Arrival_Facilities ?arrival_facilities_w2 .
  ?terminalfacility p:Maximum_Capacity ?maximum_capacity_w .
  FILTER((STR(?arrival_facilities_w) = "Arrival Hall" || (STR(?arrival_facilities_w2) = "Baggage Reclaim" && STR(?maximum_capacity_w) = "500 passengers")))
}

ambiguous_dsl.question: When can the arrival halls and baggage claim areas with a capacity of 500 people be used?
